top_5_actionable_findings: Use carousel format — 74% high engagement vs 37% for video. Single images are mid-tier (53%).
Post on Sundays — 60% high eng vs 38% on Tuesdays. March and January are peak months.
Heritage content pattern (heritage_storytelling_hook) achieves 100% high engagement across 13 observations.
Architectural framing and overhead spreads outperform product hero close-up (64-62% vs 48%). Product hero is overused.
Dramatic/moody lighting outperforms clean cold studio (68% vs 48%). Branded bright is the worst (35%).
top_5_things_to_avoid: Video format — lowest engagement rate (37%) despite being widely used (122 obs).
Educational explainer pattern — 19% high engagement across 26 observations.
editorial_lifestyle setting — 20% high engagement (avoid this setting type).
Branded bright lighting — 35% high engagement, weakest lighting category.
Generic product-only flat-lays — flagged as anti-pattern by 25 accounts.
executive_summary.archetype_verdict: Heritage Anchor = strongest archetype on all 3 dimensions (engagement, health, compliance). 10 of 15 accounts cluster in Modern Premium — high competition, mid performance. Moving an account toward Heritage Anchor positioning is the single highest-leverage strategic move.
executive_summary.occasion_insight: 84% of posts are evergreen (51% high eng baseline). Every seasonal occasion outperforms that baseline — Eid 100%, National Day 87%, Ramadan 61%. Increasing occasion-specific content from ~16% to ~30% of output is a structural opportunity.

1_what_format.question: What media format maximises engagement?
1_what_format.answer: Carousel slides first, then Reels. Single images are mid-tier. Long video underperforms.

2_when_to_post.question: What day of the week produces the highest engagement?
2_when_to_post.answer: Sunday is the best posting day. Tuesday is the worst. Weekends outperform weekdays (50% vs 43% high engagement).

3_top_engagement_signals.question: Which content features consistently drive high engagement?

4_best_patterns.question: Which patterns are highest-engagement AND most versatile?
4_best_patterns.answer: heritage_storytelling_hook (100%), parallel_original_bilingual (100%), urgency_without_pressure (100%), community_pride_statement (92%), eid_occasion_greeting (100%) are the strongest pattern signals.

5_best_setting.question: What setting should content be shot in?
5_best_setting.answer: Outdoor/retail (87%), outdoor nature (68%), heritage environments (67%) outperform indoor restaurants (47%). Editorial lifestyle is the weakest at 20%.

6_best_lighting.question: What lighting style drives the most engagement?
6_best_lighting.answer: Dramatic/moody lighting (68%) outperforms clean cold studio (48%) and branded bright (35%).

7_best_composition.question: What composition style produces the best engagement?
7_best_composition.answer: Architectural framing (64%) and overhead spread (62%) outperform product hero close-up (48%), which is the most overused composition in the corpus.

8_best_colors.question: What color palettes drive the most engagement?
8_best_colors.answer: Mixed/vibrant palettes (81%) and amber/gold (62%) are the top performers. Red and grey are weakest.

9_heritage_vs_modern.question: Does heritage content outperform modern content?
9_heritage_vs_modern.answer: Yes — heritage_vs_modern: heritage signals score 100% where present. Heritage patterns (heritage_storytelling_hook, community_pride_statement) are 2-3x stronger than educational or modern equivalents.

10_people_in_frame.question: Does showing people in frame help engagement?
10_people_in_frame.answer: Yes — posts with people: 59% high eng vs without: 51%. 4+ people in a group shot: 90% high eng.

11_sector_performance.question: How do sectors compare on engagement performance?
11_sector_performance.answer: F&B leads at 60% high engagement. Retail mid at 36%. Beauty lags at 18% — dragged by medical claims and generic flat-lays.

12_content_recipes.question: What pattern combinations (recipes) are proven to work?
12_content_recipes.answer: Top recipe: lifestyle_integration + overhead_tabletop + product_hero (11 obs, 1.0 avg eng). heritage_storytelling_hook as anchor pattern elevates any combo.

master_triplet_recipes.combo_names: Lifestyle Environment Integration + Overhead Tabletop Spread + Product Hero Static
Invitation to Witness + Product Hero Static + Seasonal Collection Drop
Customer Voice UGC + Lifestyle Environment Integration + Product Hero Static
Close-Up Macro Texture + Product Hero Static + Seasonal Collection Drop
Customer Voice UGC + Lifestyle Environment Integration + Overhead Tabletop Spread
Pattern Repeat Flatlay + Product Hero Static + Seasonal Collection Drop
Cultural Object Hero + Lifestyle Environment Integration + Product Hero Static
Overhead Tabletop Spread + Product Hero Static + Specific Dish or Product Naming in Arabic

13_what_to_avoid.question: What content types and approaches should be avoided?
13_what_to_avoid.answer: Sponsored content without authentic angle (26 accounts flag this), generic flat-lays (25 accounts), medical-claim language in beauty (17 accounts), educational/explainer format (19% eng rate), lifestyle_embed pattern (11%).

14_brand_archetypes.question: What brand archetype is most common, and which performs best?
14_brand_archetypes.answer: Modern Premium dominates (10/15 accounts). Heritage Anchor is rare but has the highest-scoring individual account (OGZ-F-AND-B-Reference-010, health grade A, 86% avg eng).

15_content_pillars.question: What content pillars drive the best engagement?
15_content_pillars.answer: Lifestyle Editorial (70% high eng) > Seasonal/Occasion (69%) > Product Showcase (55%). Product Showcase is the most used (45% of all posts) but not the highest performer.

16_competitive_positioning.question: Which accounts are competitive twins, and which are maximally differentiated?

17_occasion_format_grid.question: For each campaign occasion, what is the optimal content recipe?
17_occasion_format_grid.answer: Seasonal occasions dominate: Eid al-Fitr 100% high eng, National Day 87%. Evergreen (84% of corpus) sits at just 51% — seasonal/occasion content always outperforms. Use occasion-specific patterns (eid_occasion_greeting, national_day_modernity_heritage) and image format.

top_5_patterns.name: Specific Dish or Product Naming in Arabic
Specific Dish or Product Naming in Arabic

18_compliance_deep_dive.question: Where are the compliance risks, and do they correlate with lower engagement?
18_compliance_deep_dive.answer: 49 of 474 observations flagged (10%). Surprisingly, flagged content engagement is essentially identical to clean content — flags are calibration issues not performance killers. Top risk: western_occasion_import and regional_language_mismatch soft flags.

engagement_delta.insight: Flagged content unexpectedly outperforms — review flag calibration

19_archetype_benchmark.question: Which brand archetype strategy produces the best outcomes?
19_archetype_benchmark.answer: Heritage Anchor wins on all 3 dimensions: highest engagement (74% high eng), highest health score (0.856), lowest compliance risk. Mass Market Functional is the worst performer (24% high eng). Modern Premium accounts for 10/15 accounts but underperforms Heritage Anchor by ~19pp.
key_findings: Best-performing archetype: Heritage Anchor (74% high eng)
Worst-performing archetype: Mass Market Functional (24% high eng)
Heritage Anchor uses dramatically higher hospitality cue density than Modern Premium
Community Warm archetype relies more on character presence than any other archetype
